name: dropdown
label: Dropdown
description: A click-to-open menu anchored to its trigger, with configurable position, alignment, and gap.

props.name: position
props.description: Which side of the trigger the menu opens on.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the menu relative to the trigger.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing between trigger and menu (Tailwind spacing units).

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The clickable element that opens the dropdown.
